query:
DELETE FROM teachers
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT 
      t1.id
    FROM teachers t1
    INNER JOIN (
      SELECT userId, MAX(createdAt) as max_created
      FROM teachers
      GROUP BY userId
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ) t2 ON t1.userId = t2.userId
    WHERE t1.createdAt < t2.max_created
  ) AS temp
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute DELETE FROM teachers
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT 
      t1.id
    FROM teachers t1
    INNER JOIN (
      SELECT userId, MAX(createdAt) as max_created
      FROM teachers
      GROUP BY userId
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ) t2 ON t1.userId = t2.userId
    WHERE t1.createdAt < t2.max_created
  ) AS temp
);
